input.headline: The most important questions to ask when picking a health care plan

raw.headline: The most important questions to ask when picking a health care plan

winner: I asked my doctor what he thought about the new healthcare plan, and he said 'Well, you know, they offer a 20% discount if you're willing to sacrifice your firstborn.' I said, 'That's steep, doc,' and he replied, 'Wait till you see the premium on your soul.'

candidates.text: I asked my doctor, 'Which healthcare plan should I choose?' She replied, 'The one where you get reimbursed for sleep—it’s literally the most important question.'
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific with a clever twist on healthcare plans and sleep."}

candidates.text: Why did I bring a ladder to my doctor's appointment? Because I heard the insurance plan had a high deductible!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to health care plans and has a mild surprise element with the ladder and deductible connection. However, it's a bit generic and lacks specificity in tying the humor directly to picking a health care plan."}

candidates.text: Why did the health insurance agent bring a ladder to work? To raise the bar on my copay!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'raise the bar,' but it's a bit generic and doesn't directly tie into the headline about picking a health care plan. The humor is mild and could be more specific to the topic."}

candidates.text: Why did I get kicked out of the healthcare plan selection seminar? Because I kept asking, "Is this plan *insured*?
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke has a clever play on words with 'insured,' but the setup is somewhat generic and lacks specificity. The surprise factor is moderate, and while it's concise, the humor could be stronger with more context or punch."}

candidates.text: I asked my doctor what he thought about the new healthcare plan, and he said 'Well, you know, they offer a 20% discount if you're willing to sacrifice your firstborn.' I said, 'That's steep, doc,' and he replied, 'Wait till you see the premium on your soul.'
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific with the mention of sacrificing a firstborn and the premium on the soul. However, it's slightly generic in its setup and includes a dark humor element that may not appeal to all audiences."}
